name: Chandigarh

seo.title: Packers & Movers in Chandigarh — 480+ Verified Vendors | ShiftIndia
seo.description: Compare 480+ verified packers and movers in Chandigarh, Mohali & Panchkula. Instant quotes starting ₹4,500. All sectors covered. Live GPS tracking.

hero.title: Packers & Movers in Chandigarh
hero.subtitle: Sector 17 to Mohali, Panchkula to Zirakpur — 480+ verified movers across the Tricity.

intro:
The Chandigarh Tricity — Chandigarh, Mohali, and Panchkula — is one of India's most planned urban zones. ShiftIndia covers all sectors and the rapidly expanding satellite areas of Zirakpur, Aerocity, and New Chandigarh.

Our 480+ verified vendors know the sector grid and society access rules intimately.
whyUs: Chandigarh's grid layout and wide roads make logistics straightforward, but high-rise societies in Mohali and Panchkula have strict lift and parking rules. Our vendors are experienced with these and plan accordingly.

faqs.q: Do you cover Mohali and Panchkula?
faqs.a: Yes — the entire Tricity including Zirakpur, Aerocity, and New Chandigarh is covered.

faqs.q: What is the cost for a 2 BHK move within Chandigarh?
faqs.a: ₹7,000 – ₹13,000 depending on sector distance, floor, and packing requirements.

faqs.q: Do you move between Chandigarh and Delhi?
faqs.a: Yes. Inter-city moves to Delhi, Ludhiana, Amritsar and beyond are available with full GPS tracking.
